Testing Simulation

2022-11-21

Set constant

Generate the baseline equilibrium

Comparative statics

Setting

$constant \(constant\)n_ths \(constant\)n_ths[[1]] \(constant\)n_ths[[1]][[1]] [1] 3

\(constant\)n_market [1] 1

\(constant\)n_zone [1] 1

\(constant\)n_x_a [1] 2

\(constant\)n_x_c [1] 2

\(constant\)method_s_w [1] “exact”

\(constant\)margin [1] 1e-10

\(constant\)quadrature_size [1] 21

\(constant\)tol [1] 1e-16

\(constant\)minimum_wage [1] FALSE

\(constant\)use_parallel [1] TRUE

\(constant\)use_rcpp [1] TRUE

$parameter \(parameter\)m_w [1] 0.5

\(parameter\)m_f [1] 0.5

\(parameter\)lambda_w [1] 0.5

\(parameter\)lambda_f [1] -0.5

\(parameter\)beta_w [1] 10 -1

\(parameter\)beta_f [1] 10 1

\(parameter\)gamma_w [1] 0.3 0.3

\(parameter\)gamma_f [1] 0.3 0.3

$shock $shock[[1]] $shock[[1]][[1]] \(shock[[1]][[1]]\)mu [,1] [1,] 0.9 [2,] 0.9 [3,] 0.9

\(shock[[1]][[1]]\)ea_w [,1] [1,] 0 [2,] 0 [3,] 0

\(shock[[1]][[1]]\)ea_f [,1] [1,] 0 [2,] 0 [3,] 0

\(shock[[1]][[1]]\)ec_w [,1] [1,] 0 [2,] 0 [3,] 0

\(shock[[1]][[1]]\)ec_f [,1] [1,] 0 [2,] 0 [3,] 0

$exogenous $exogenous[[1]] $exogenous[[1]][[1]] \(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)x_a_w [,1] [,2] [1,] 1 0 [2,] 1 1 [3,] 1 0

\(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)x_a_f [,1] [,2] [1,] 1 0 [2,] 1 1 [3,] 1 0

\(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)x_c_w [,1] [,2] [1,] 1 0 [2,] 1 1 [3,] 1 0

\(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)x_c_f [,1] [,2] [1,] 1 0 [2,] 1 1 [3,] 1 0

\(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)w_0 [1] -10

\(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)f_0 [1] 0

\(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)size_w [1] 1

\(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)size_f [1] 1

\(exogenous[[1]][[1]]\)owner [,1] [,2] [,3] [1,] 1 0 0 [2,] 0 1 0 [3,] 0 0 1

$endogenous $endogenous[[1]] $endogenous[[1]][[1]] \(endogenous[[1]][[1]]\)w [,1] [1,] 0.3 [2,] 0.1 [3,] 0.1

\(endogenous[[1]][[1]]\)f [,1] [1,] 0.6 [2,] 5.1 [3,] 5.1

\(endogenous[[1]][[1]]\)s_w [,1] [1,] 0.3333333 [2,] 0.3333333 [3,] 0.3333333

\(endogenous[[1]][[1]]\)s_f [,1] [1,] 0.3333333 [2,] 0.3333333 [3,] 0.3333333

\(endogenous[[1]][[1]]\)eta_w [,1] [1,] 0.01 [2,] 0.01

\(endogenous[[1]][[1]]\)eta_f [,1] [1,] 0.01 [2,] 0.01
